stemHtml: How does body temperature affect cognitive Performance?

options.a: Given a sufficient period of restful sleep previously, the best cognitive performance can be expected when the body temperature is rising.
options.b: The effect of body temperature on cognitive performance is marginal; temperature only affects physical performance.
options.c: Sleeping during the phase of high body temperature improves cognitive performance.
options.d: The cognitive performance is best when the body is just past its peak temperature.
